steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: Sentence 2 establishes a place: the sculpture is built on the wall of a university building in the United States. Sentence 3 (after the blank) describes how the sculpture appears at that location.

steps.title: Pick the transition
steps.content:
There means "in/at that location" — a tight, place-pointing transition that links sentence 3 back to the U.S. university wall.

Later implies time progression (not place). For instance introduces an example (the sentence is about this sculpture, not an instance of a category). However implies contrast, but no contrast is set up.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
